steps.title: Define the prior term
steps.content: The previous sentence calls the 480 BCE eclipse annular. The next sentence explains that term by saying the Moon did not completely cover the Sun and instead created a ring of fire.

steps.title: Use a restatement signal
steps.content: Choice B creates a contrast, Choice C signals simultaneous events, and Choice D introduces an example. The sentence is not contrasting, timing, or giving one example; it is defining the term just used. The answer is A.
